nodes.label: Family Vault
nodes.description: The map of maps. Everything in the vault hangs off this.
nodes.content:
Top-level Map of Content for the family vault. Each child MOC owns one of the family's seven domains.

## Children
- People (Boris, Rachel, Pip, Pickle, extended family)
- School (Lincoln Elementary, art club, summer programs)
- Health (providers, immunizations, ongoing concerns)
- Household (renovation, contractors, calendar)
- Finances (budget, accounts, insurance)
- Food (meal plans, shopping, recipes, kitchen)

nodes.content: Spring session runs through April 30. Pickup at 4:30 from the side entrance.

nodes.label: Lincoln Elementary

nodes.content: K-5 public school. Pip is in first grade, room 14. Spring break April 11-13. Last day of school June 12.

nodes.label: Dr. Naaz
nodes.description: Pediatrician for both kids. Lincoln Park Pediatrics.
nodes.content:
Lincoln Park Pediatrics, suite 240. Phone: nurse line 9am-5pm, emergency answering service after hours.

Next appointment: Pickle, Tuesday April 9 2:30pm (rash follow-up).

nodes.label: Pickle — immunizations
nodes.description: Vaccine record and upcoming dose schedule for Pickle.
nodes.content: All current through 2-year visit. Next: 4-year MMR booster (due Feb 2028).

nodes.label: Pickle — rash, April 2026
nodes.description: Tracking the rash on Pickle's left forearm — onset, photos, food log.
nodes.content: Onset Wednesday April 2, faded by Saturday. Possible delayed food reaction. Following up with Dr. Naaz Tuesday April 9.

nodes.label: Kitchen renovation
nodes.description: Planning notes for the Q3 kitchen redo.
nodes.content: Three bids in. Decision target: end of April. Work to start mid-July, ~6 weeks.

nodes.content: Paid in full. Tracking number in email.

nodes.label: Family budget 2026
nodes.description: Annual household budget set in January, tracking against actuals quarterly.
nodes.content: $5,400/month plan. Q1 ran ~$95/month over due to grocery inflation.

nodes.label: Car insurance
nodes.description: Current carrier and renewal dates.
nodes.content: Carrier: GEICO. Renewal June 12. Quote up 15% this cycle — worth shopping.

nodes.content: Week of April 7. Lighter dinners, asparagus is back. Friday is pizza night.

nodes.content: Asparagus risotto, sheet pan salmon, pea soup, lemon roast chicken, plus the pasta basics.

nodes.label: Boris's parents
nodes.description: Maria and Anton. Visit twice a year, usually April and September.
nodes.content: Maria and Anton. Live in Vancouver. Asking about a holiday week in late August or early September.

nodes.label: Rachel's mom (Susan)
nodes.description: Lives 40 min away. Picks up Pip from school occasionally.
nodes.content: Susan. Available for emergency school pickups. Strong preference for advance notice.
